sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29945" key="e)ggastrima/xaira" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγγαστρι-μάχαιρα</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, comic name of a glutton in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0233.tlg001:85" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">85</biblScope></bibl>, <sense id="n29945.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who makes havoc with his belly.</tr_> </sense> </entryFree>
